overview.description: Demonstration of positive test for MySQL DB
overview.name: Positive MYSQL DB Test

http.comment: Check ability to get empty list of news

mysql.comment: Check ability to get empty list of news
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news;; SELECT newsName FROM news

migrate.comment: Check ability to migrate test dataset
migrate.name: MYSQL

mysql.comment: Check ability to get new news data with SQL query

http.comment: Check ability to get new news data with HTTP query

mysql.comment: Check ability to make INSERT query into the DB

http.comment: Check ability to post new news with HTTP query

var.comment: Creating variable with id of previous command
var.name: newsId

mysql.comment: Check ability to get news added with INSERT and HTTP queries

mysql.query: DELETE FROM news WHERE active = false;; DELETE FROM news WHERE id = 6

mysql.comment: Checking that that records were deleted
Check ability to conduct UPDATE query

http.comment: Check ability to get news by name with updated name

mysql.comment: Check ability to get updated news name
mysql.query: SELECT newsname, newsnumber FROM news WHERE id = {{newsId}}

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct 4 query in one conduction
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (10, 'News10', 10, true, '2023-04-21 10:51:02')
UPDATE news SET newsnumber = 11 WHERE newsname = 'News10'
